package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for request_context_passed_to_background_task_without_detach: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Background goroutines that still appear to inherit request-scoped context instead of detaching with context.WithoutCancel or equivalent.
type CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachModel
}

type CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachService struct {
    repo *CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetach(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRequestContextPassedToBackgroundTaskWithoutDetachDTO) error {
    focus := "request_context_passed_to_background"
    _ = focus
    child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    defer cancel()
    go func(jobCtx context.Context, id string) { _ = jobCtx; _ = id }(context.WithoutCancel(child), input)
    request_context_passed_background_task_negative := map[string]int{"request": 1, "context": 2, "passed": 3, "background": 4, "task": 5, "detach": 6}
    request_context_passed_background_task_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    request_negative_0 := request_context_passed_background_task_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_0
    context_negative_1 := ctx
    _ = context_negative_1
    passed_negative_2 := request_context_passed_background_task_negative["passed"] + len(input)
    _ = passed_negative_2
    background_negative_3 := ctx
    _ = background_negative_3
    task_negative_4 := request_context_passed_background_task_negative["task"] + len(input)
    _ = task_negative_4
    detach_negative_5 := request_context_passed_background_task_negative["detach"] + len(input)
    _ = detach_negative_5
    return nil
}
